title: frontend: ScaleButton: Memoize replica count computation
author: kishore08-07

findings.description: Title says 'Memoize' and description mentions React.useMemo for currentNumReplicas, but final implementation uses a direct call; title/description should reflect the actual implementation.
parseInt(replicas, 10) with explicit radix and Number.isFinite guard is strictly safer than the old parseInt without radix.
Module-scope placement makes getNumReplicas independently testable without mounting a component.
Lazy useState initializer correctly freezes the dialog's initial replica count at open time, preserving user edits across live resource updates.
Explicit typeof replicas === 'string' branch handles both string and number spec.replicas values correctly.
